title: Dependency Upgrade Policy
body:
Standard process for upgrading dependencies:

1. Assess the current dependency version against the latest stable release.
2. Review the changelog and any migration guides.
3. Run compatibility and regression tests in a staging environment.
4. Update the dependency version in the project manifest.
5. Obtain code review and approval from the team lead.
6. Deploy the change following the standard CI/CD pipeline.
7. Monitor application performance and error logs for 48 hours after deployment.

Any deviation from these steps must be documented in the corresponding ticket.
